title: tragus pratensis
intro: Tragus pratensis, also known as buttercup oxalis or wild oxalis, is a perennial plant species belonging to the oxalis genus and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of oxalic acid and other compounds. The health benefits of Tragus pratensis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain urinary tract issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although it is essential to note that the plant's toxicity can be a concern when consumed in large quantities.
